trials.supervisor_analysis: Stage 1 baseline_profile is complete. Baseline established at score 73.20 (3.38ms latency vs 7.76ms reference). Profiling shows Elementwise ops (45.7%) and GEMM (45.6%) dominate, with attention softmax at 5.4% and window ops at 3.1%. torch.compile already applied giving 2.30x speedup. Advancing to optimization stage.
